docket_entries.description: ORDER SUSTAINING DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED FILED BY DEFENDANT LAVERING MR., GARY LAVERING MRS, CAROL

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT - NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED -- DEFENDANT GARY LAVERING'S DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND -- NO OPPOSITION FILED.HON. A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II REPORTER: LEE BATARA CSR#3759
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-24-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAVERING, JOHN ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE (TO DEFENDANTS' COUNSEL) SET FOR FEB-24-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN ORDER/JUDGMENT ON SUSTAINING OF DEMURRER WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE JAN-10-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAVERING, JOHN TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT LAVERING MR., GARY LAVERING MRS, CAROL - JUDGMENT FOLLOWING SUSTAINING OF DEMURRER WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. SEE SCANNED DOC.
